detail.description:
Enter a new Sengoku period where strategy and life (drama) intersect!

"Nobunaga's Ambition: True Battle" is an innovative Sengoku SLG x RPG, officially licensed by "Nobunaga's Ambition: A Realm Reborn" and brought to you by the creators of "Romance of the Three Kingdoms True Battle," which has been downloaded over 100 million times worldwide.

[Assemble! The Strongest Vassals]
Collect and train over 100 warlords.
Organize your vassals freely based on a variety of elements: military branch, fami
detail.recentChanges:
S3シーズン「衆心成城」5月16日 開幕！
※サーバーにより、開始日時が異なりますので、ご注意ください。

・8名のS3シーズン限定武将が登場
この戦場にもたらす、新たな変化とは！？

・4つの「事件戦法」が新登場
編制に、無限の可能性を！

・新システム「一門設備」実装
より堅固な防衛線を築き、戦局を支配せよ！

・新システム「一門調略」登場
奇策をもって勝機を掴み、戦局を覆せ！

戦陣に新風、無限の策へ！

inferredReasons.label: 🔍 待深入調查
